name: skillshelf
description: Agent-first skill registry + manager for Claude Code and compatible agents.
author: Wang-Cankun (https://github.com/Wang-Cankun)

scripts.preinstall:
bun --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '
skillshelf requires the Bun runtime (https://bun.sh) — its bin is a TypeScript entrypoint, not a compiled Node script.
Install Bun, then:  bun add -g skillshelf   (or run without installing:  bunx skillshelf <command>)
' >&2; exit 1; }
